Klasse ConsoleOutput

java.lang.Object
de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ui.console.ConsoleOutput
public class ConsoleOutput extends Object
Provides formatted console output for informational, warning, and error messages, including optional ANSI color codes for improved readability.

This class centralizes all console printing logic used throughout the application. It supports:

  • standard text output,
  • colored error messages,
  • colored info messages,
  • colored warnings,
  • preview section markers for data previews.
The formatting ensures consistent visual structure in the console UI and makes important messages easier to distinguish.

    Konstruktoren
    Konstruktor
    Beschreibung
    ConsoleOutput()
     

  • Methodenübersicht

    Modifikator und Typ
    Methode
    Beschreibung
    void
    print(String text)
    Prints a plain text line to the console.
    void
    printError(String errormessage)
    Prints an error message with a red "[ERROR]" label.
    void
    printInfo(String infomessage)
    Prints an informational message with a blue "[INFO]" label.
    void
    printPreviewEnd()
    Prints the end marker for a preview section.
    void
    printPreviewStart()
    Prints the start marker for a preview section.
    void
    printWarning(String warningmessage)
    Prints a warning message with a yellow "[WARNING]" label.

    Von Klasse geerbte Methoden Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Konstruktordetails

    • ConsoleOutput

      public ConsoleOutput()

  • Methodendetails

    • print

      public void print(String text)
      Prints a plain text line to the console.
      Parameter:
      text - the text to print

    • printError

      public void printError(String errormessage)
      Prints an error message with a red "[ERROR]" label.
      Parameter:
      errormessage - the error message to display

    • printInfo

      public void printInfo(String infomessage)
      Prints an informational message with a blue "[INFO]" label.
      Parameter:
      infomessage - the information message to display

    • printPreviewStart

      public void printPreviewStart()
      Prints the start marker for a preview section. Used by preview components to visually separate preview output.

    • printPreviewEnd

      public void printPreviewEnd()
      Prints the end marker for a preview section.

    • printWarning

      public void printWarning(String warningmessage)
      Prints a warning message with a yellow "[WARNING]" label.
      Parameter:
      warningmessage - the warning message to display
